topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
title: Some, any, much, many, few y little
communication_goal: Usar some, any, much, many, few y little en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to some, any, much, many, few y little.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla some, any, much, many, few y little mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
lessons.title: Some and any
lessons.objective: Usar some y any en afirmaciones, preguntas y negaciones con sustantivos contables y no contables.

activities.prompt: There are ___ apples on the table.
activities.feedback_correct: Some se usa normalmente en afirmaciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Esta es una oración afirmativa con un plural contable.

activities.prompt: Do you have ___ questions?
activities.feedback_correct: Any es frecuente en preguntas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: En una pregunta general usamos any.

activities.prompt: We don't have ___ milk.
activities.feedback_correct: Any se usa en negaciones con milk.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La oración es negativa y milk es no contable.

activities.prompt: Would you like ___ tea?
activities.feedback_correct: En ofrecimientos amables usamos some.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Es un ofrecimiento, no una pregunta de existencia.

activities.prompt: There isn't some coffee.
activities.feedback_correct: Usamos any en una negación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia some por any porque la oración contiene isn't.

activities.prompt: I have some sandwiches, but I don't have any fruit. Do you have any fruit?
activities.question: What does the speaker not have?
activities.feedback_correct: I don't have any fruit indica ausencia de fruta.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la frase negativa después de but.

activities.prompt: I have some bread. Do you have any cheese? No, I don't have any cheese.
activities.feedback_correct: Distingues some en afirmaciones y any en preguntas y negaciones.
activities.feedback_incorrect: No conviertas any en una sílaba fuerte; mantén el ritmo de la frase.

activities.prompt: Hi! There are some snacks in the kitchen, but there isn't any juice. Are there any cups? Yes, there are some cups beside the plates.
activities.question: What is not in the kitchen?
activities.feedback_correct: Identificaste la negación con any.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la oración que empieza con there isn't.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences about what there is and isn't in your kitchen. Use some at least twice and any at least twice.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste some y any en contextos adecuados.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa si la oración es afirmativa, negativa o interrogativa.

activities.instruction: Prepara una merienda con la IA.
activities.prompt: Ask the AI what food is available, say what you have, what you don't have, and offer some items to a guest.
success_criteria: uses some in offers and affirmations
uses any in questions and negatives
activities.feedback_correct: Usas some y any de forma funcional en una conversación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te da una situación y corrige el cuantificador dentro de la frase.

lessons.topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
lessons.title: Much, many, and a lot of
lessons.objective: Elegir much, many o a lot of para hablar de cantidades grandes en contextos cotidianos.

activities.prompt: How ___ people are in the room?
activities.feedback_correct: People es contable plural; usamos How many.
activities.feedback_incorrect: People puede contarse, así que usa many.

activities.prompt: How ___ time do you have?
activities.feedback_correct: Time es no contable en esta expresión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Time no se cuenta directamente; usa How much.

activities.prompt: She has ___ work today.
activities.feedback_correct: A lot of funciona con work en una afirmación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Work es no contable y la frase es afirmativa.

activities.prompt: There isn't ___ traffic today.
activities.feedback_correct: Much se usa con traffic en una negación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Traffic es no contable en este contexto.

activities.prompt: How much students are in your class?
activities.correct_answer: How many students are in your class?
activities.feedback_correct: Students es un plural contable.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia much por many porque students puede contarse.

activities.prompt: There are many shops downtown, but there isn't much parking. The area has a lot of restaurants too.
activities.question: What is difficult to find downtown?
activities.feedback_correct: There isn't much parking indica que hay poco estacionamiento.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la información después de but.

activities.prompt: How many books? How much time? I have a lot of books. I don't have much time.
activities.feedback_correct: La diferencia entre contables y no contables se escucha con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica many con plural y much con sustantivos no contables.

activities.prompt: David has a lot of friends and many books. He has much homework this week, so he doesn't have much free time.
activities.question: What does David have little time for?
activities.feedback_correct: La última parte explica que tiene poco tiempo libre.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la expresión relacionada con time.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences comparing two places. Use many with countable nouns, much with uncountable nouns, and a lot of in affirmative sentences.
evaluation_criteria: a lot of in affirmative context
activities.feedback_correct: Elegiste los cuantificadores según el sustantivo y el tipo de oración.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Primero identifica si el sustantivo es contable y si la oración es afirmativa, negativa o interrogativa.

activities.prompt: Compare two cities with the AI. Discuss how many people, shops, parks, and how much traffic, noise, and free time there are.
success_criteria: uses a lot of in affirmations
activities.feedback_correct: Comparas lugares con cantidades de manera natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te pide reformular la frase según el tipo de sustantivo.

lessons.topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
lessons.title: Few and little
lessons.objective: Expresar cantidades pequeñas y distinguir few, a few, little y a little.

activities.prompt: I have ___ friends in this city, but I am happy.
activities.feedback_correct: A few se usa con amigos contables y significa algunos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Friends es contable plural; usa a few.

activities.prompt: There is ___ water in the bottle, so we need more.
activities.feedback_correct: A little se usa con water y expresa una pequeña cantidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Water es no contable; usa a little.

activities.prompt: Few students arrived early; the room is almost empty.
activities.feedback_correct: Few con sustantivo contable indica muy pocos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Students es contable plural y la idea es una cantidad insuficiente.

activities.prompt: I have a little time. I can help you.
activities.feedback_correct: A little expresa una cantidad pequeña pero suficiente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La frase dice que sí puede ayudar.

activities.prompt: I have a little books.
activities.feedback_correct: Books es contable plural, por eso usamos a few.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia little por few cuando el sustantivo es contable plural.

activities.prompt: We have a few chairs, but few people are here. There is a little coffee, but little sugar.
activities.question: What is almost finished?
activities.feedback_correct: Little sugar indica una cantidad muy pequeña.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la última parte del mensaje.

activities.prompt: A few books. A little time. Few people. Little money.
activities.feedback_correct: Distingues cantidades pequeñas contables y no contables.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Few va con plurales contables; little va con sustantivos no contables.

activities.prompt: Only a few tickets are left, but there is still a little time to buy them. Few seats are near the stage, and little information is available online.
activities.question: What is available to buy?
activities.feedback_correct: A few tickets significa que quedan algunos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la primera información sobre lo que queda.

activities.prompt: Write eight sentences about a busy day. Use few, a few, little, and a little at least twice each.
evaluation_criteria: a few with a positive or sufficient meaning
a little with a small but useful amount
activities.feedback_correct: Expresas cantidades pequeñas y sus matices correctamente.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Comprueba si la cantidad es suficiente (a few/a little) o insuficiente (few/little).

activities.prompt: Plan an event with limited supplies. Tell the AI what you have few, a few, little, or a little of, and decide what to buy.
activities.feedback_correct: Comunicas cantidades pequeñas y tomas decisiones prácticas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra si la cantidad es suficiente o insuficiente y te ayuda a reformular.

lessons.topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
lessons.title: The complete quantity challenge
lessons.objective: Integrar los cuantificadores principales en compras, planificación y conversaciones cotidianas.

activities.prompt: There are ___ people at the party.
activities.feedback_correct: People es contable plural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa many con sustantivos contables plurales.

activities.prompt: We don't have ___ time before the train.
activities.feedback_correct: Time es no contable y la oración es negativa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige much para un sustantivo no contable.

activities.prompt: Would you like ___ cookies?
activities.feedback_correct: Some se usa en ofrecimientos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Es un ofrecimiento afirmativo con un plural contable.

activities.prompt: There are ___ chairs, so everyone can sit.
activities.feedback_correct: A few indica algunos y suficientes chairs.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Chairs es contable plural y la cantidad es suficiente.

activities.prompt: Do we have much plates? No, we have few plates.
activities.correct_answer: Do we have many plates? No, we have few plates.
activities.feedback_correct: Plates es contable plural; usamos many en la pregunta.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia much por many porque plates puede contarse.

activities.prompt: We have some bread, a little cheese, many apples, and only a few bottles of water. We don't have any juice.
activities.question: What do we have only a few of?
activities.feedback_correct: Only a few bottles of water expresa una cantidad pequeña.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la expresión only a few.

activities.prompt: How many guests are coming? A few. How much food do we need? A lot of food, but only a little juice.
activities.feedback_correct: Las cantidades se entienden y el ritmo es natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica primero las preguntas y después responde con cantidades breves.

activities.prompt: For the class picnic, we need some sandwiches, many cups, a lot of fruit, a few plates, and a little juice. We don't need any coffee.
activities.question: What do we not need?
activities.feedback_correct: La negación uses any coffee.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la última oración del plan.

activities.prompt: Write a shopping list for a picnic using some, any, much, many, a lot of, few, a few, little, and a little. Add one question about quantity.
activities.feedback_correct: Usaste todos los cuantificadores en un contexto útil.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa el tipo de sustantivo y si la frase es afirmativa, negativa o interrogativa.

activities.instruction: Planifica una fiesta con la IA.
activities.prompt: Plan a party for ten people. Check supplies, ask how much and how many you need, explain shortages, offer items, and finalize the shopping list.
success_criteria: asks at least four quantity questions
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes manejar cantidades y tomar decisiones en una conversación completa.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA adapta las cantidades y te ofrece una reformulación breve para cada error.
